description: Generate learned agents or skills, update routing state, evaluate challengers, and manage promotion, demotion, and maintenance outputs.

project_rules.md.source: project memory patterns file or .dynos routing notes

.dynos/learned-agents/executors/{agent-n.description: Generated learned executor instructions for a specialized task pattern

.dynos/learned-agents/auditors/{agent-na.description: Generated learned auditor instructions for a specialized finding pattern

.dynos/learned-agents/skills/{skill-name.description: Generated learned skill instructions derived from repeated successful patterns

.dynos/learned-agents/registry.json.description: Live learned-component registry with routing mode, benchmark history, promotion state, and route eligibility

project_rules.md.description: Updated agent routing table and last-generation marker

.dynos/proactive-findings.json.description: Repository-wide proactive findings produced by the strategic scanner

benchmark_summary.description: Evaluation summary and recommendation for candidate learned components

automation_status.description: Queue, freshness, and auto-benchmark status emitted by the automation runtime
